hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -Eq '(^|[^[:alnum:]_])git[[:space:]]+([^[:space:]]+[[:space:]]+)*(commit|push)([[:space:]]|$)' && jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Blocked by local hook: git commit/push is prohibited here. Ask the user to run it themselves."}}' || true

jq -e 'select(.tool_input.dangerouslyDisableSandbox == true) | select(((.tool_input.command // "") | test("gradlew|start_servers|run_benchmark|ds_unsandboxed")) | not)' >/dev/null 2>&1 && jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Unsandboxed Bash is restricted to the Armadillo launch (gradlew/start_servers). Run other commands sandboxed."}}' || true

jq -e 'select(.tool_input.file_path // "" | test("/[.]claude/(CLAUDE[.]md|settings([.]local)?[.]json)$"))' >/dev/null 2>&1 && jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"~/.claude/* are symlinks to the dotfiles repo. Edit the source at ~/dotfiles/claude/ instead (e.g. ~/dotfiles/claude/CLAUDE.md or ~/dotfiles/claude/settings.json)."}}' || true

{ echo "== STARTUP BRIEFING (auto-injected by SessionStart hook) =="; echo; echo "These files are NOT auto-loaded. When work touches a repo or topic below, READ the relevant file before acting — do not wait to be pointed to it."; echo; echo "CLAUDE.md files (read when working in that repo):"; find ~/git-repos -maxdepth 4 -iname 'CLAUDE.md' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' 2>/dev/null | sort | while read -r f; do d=$(grep -m10 -E '^(#{1,6}[[:space:]]|#[[:space:]])' "$f" 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/^#+[[:space:]]*//' | grep -m1 -E '[[:alpha:]]'); echo "- $f"; [ -n "$d" ] && echo "    $d"; done; echo; echo "Notes (~/dotfiles/claude/notes/ — operational setup, sandbox exceptions, guides):"; find ~/dotfiles/claude/notes -type f \( -name '*.md' -o -name '*.R' -o -name '*.sh' \) 2>/dev/null | sort | while read -r f; do d=$(grep -m10 -E '^(#{1,6}[[:space:]]|#[[:space:]])' "$f" 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/^#+[[:space:]]*//' | grep -m1 -E '[[:alpha:]]'); echo "- $f"; [ -n "$d" ] && echo "    $d"; done; } | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:.}}'
